config.html:
Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frmDonHangBuAdd
Nút WinForms gốc: Chọn nhiều chi tiết · Lưu · Đóng
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: TR_DINHMUC_GOVAN_Get, TR_DINHMUC_NGUKIM_Get2, TR_KHACHHANG_Get, TR_MATERIAL_GETBYKHO, TR_MATERIAL_GetAll, TR_ORDER_DETAIL_GETALL, TR_ORDER_DETAIL_GETLISTBYORDER, TR_ORDER_GET2
Entity phụ (lookup/filter cân nhắc thêm): tr_banve, tr_color, tr_common, tr_dinhmuc_donggoi, tr_dinhmuc_govan, tr_dinhmuc_ngukim, tr_hehang, tr_khachhang, tr_loaisp, tr_material, tr_order, tr_order_detail, tr_order_replacement, tr_sanpham
